_meta.codeowners: <path to your CODEOWNERS file and approval requirements>
_meta.note: Fill in this file and drop it at <your-docs-repo>/.devex-kit/escalation-triggers.json. The docs-contribution-router skill reads this file before falling back to the bundled Scalekit sample.

severity_levels.low: <Describe what low severity means and the required action>
severity_levels.medium: <Describe what medium severity means and the required action>
severity_levels.high: <Describe what high severity means and the required action>
severity_levels.critical: <Describe what critical severity means and the required action>

triggers.path_glob: <glob pattern matching sensitive files, e.g. src/configs/sidebar.config.ts>
triggers.reason: <Why this path is sensitive and what breaks when it changes without review>
triggers.pr_note: <What the contributor must include in their PR description>

triggers.reason: <Why this path requires the highest level of review>
